$comment: ClaudeAgentOptions for Mimi's programmatic dispatch harness (M0). Mirrors .claude/settings.json discipline; expand mcpServers only after monaecode Phase 3 approval. Reference: .ai/shared/references/claude-agent-sdk.md
systemPromptAppend: You are Mimi (mimi), portfolio dispatcher for monaecode. Load .ai/agents/mimi/AGENT.md and contract 20260717-mimi-dispatcher-bootstrap-monaecode when present. Follow dispatch discipline: task-id + run folder before edits, [SAI][PLAN] before changes, real <@USER_ID> Slack mentions, no merge/force-push/registry-activation/channel-creation, monaecode overrides Sai.

hooks.$comment: Hook shapes are resolved by run_agent.py against the installed SDK; documented here as the intended dispatch-discipline mirror of .claude/settings.json.

PreToolUse.note: block force-push (prohibited by CHARTER + contract hard limit); mirror .claude/settings.json deny list

PostToolUse.note: after git push, verify remote SHA and emit PUSH via scripts/agent-report push-confirm

SessionStart.note: read CLAUDE.md + .ai/CONTEXT.md; contracts live in .ai/contracts/; no self-activation in registry
